title: tangy chewy venezuelan kiebasa bowl
description: solo dinner featuring kielbasa, boiled potatoes, and a tangy sauce. great for a busy weeknight meal.
instructions: Boil the potatoes in a large pot of salted water until they are tender, about 10 minutes.
Meanwhile, slice the onion and mince the garlic.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the kielbasa to the skillet and cook, browning on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the kielbasa from the skillet and set aside.
Add the sliced onion to the skillet and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Stir in the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add the canned tomatoes, vinegar, salt, and pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Return the kielbasa to the skillet and stir to coat with the sauce.
To assemble the bowls, place a portion of the boiled potatoes in the bottom, then top with the kielbasa and sauce.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and shredded cheese, if using.
